name: Retractable Claws
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Adapt and Overcome
granted_abilities.text: When this model declares a non-general action, it may choose one friendly attached upgrade to receive a (r) and one suit to that action's Skl. After resolving the action, discard the chosen upgrade.

granted_abilities.name: Ferocity
granted_abilities.text: Once per turn. When receiving raises, this model may deal 1 irreducible damage to itself to receive an additional raise.
